provenance: PLACEHOLDER bounds — rough/theoretical, NOT measured. Phase 2b will replace these with the empirically-determined safe envelope (annulus radii, z limits, J1 rear dead-zone, J2/J3 coupling polygon). Same discipline as kinematics: implement the gate logic now, calibrate the numbers later.
coupling_note: Empty for now: only per-axis joint ranges are enforced. Phase 2b TODO — measure the J2/J3 coupling polygon (e.g. observed J3 upper limit ~60 deg when J2~0) and encode it here as linear half-plane constraints {j2_coeff, j3_coeff, max_value, label}.
